<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /forge:init — confidence: 97% -->
# Plugin Interface (Commands, Hooks, Skills)

Forge has no HTTP routing. Its "API surface" is the Claude Code plugin extension system.

## Commands (Slash Commands)

All commands live in `forge/commands/`. They are Markdown files loaded as slash commands
by Claude Code when the plugin is installed. Each maps to a `/forge:<name>` invocation.

| Command | File | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/forge:init` | `commands/init.md` | Bootstrap complete SDLC instance in a project |
| `/forge:health` | `commands/health.md` | Detect stale docs, orphaned entities, skill gaps |
| `/forge:update` | `commands/update.md` | Propagate plugin upgrade into project artifacts |
| `/forge:update-tools` | `commands/update-tools.md` | Copy latest tools/schemas into project |
| `/forge:regenerate` | `commands/regenerate.md` | Refresh specific artifact categories |
| `/forge:add-pipeline` | `commands/add-pipeline.md` | Add/update named pipeline in config |
| `/forge:migrate` | `commands/migrate.md` | Migrate pre-Forge store to Forge format (interactive) |
| `/forge:remove` | `commands/remove.md` | Remove Forge artifacts from project |
| `/forge:report-bug` | `commands/report-bug.md` | File bug against Forge itself via `gh` |

## Hooks

Hooks are registered in `forge/hooks/hooks.json` and execute automatically.

| Event | Handler | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `SessionStart` | `hooks/check-update.js` | Inject Forge context; check for newer version; prompt `/forge:update` after install |
| `PostToolUse` (Bash) | `hooks/triage-error.js` | On non-zero exit from Forge-related commands, suggest `/forge:report-bug` |

## Utilities (not hooks)

| File | Invoked by | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `hooks/list-skills.js` | `commands/health.md`, `init/sdlc-init.md` | List all installed skills for skill-gap detection |

## Auth

No authentication. The plugin runs in the user's local Claude Code session with
whatever permissions the user has granted to Claude Code.

## Plugin Manifest

`forge/.claude-plugin/plugin.json` — declares version, description, author, repository.
`/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` — marketplace descriptor (repo root, not in `forge/`).
